description: A premium, Canva-quality personalized Solar Return astrology report built with jsPDF. Uses natal chart + solar return chart data to generate a multi-section PDF with expert-level astrological interpretations.

technicalStack.layoutEngine: Custom PDFContext (src/lib/pdfSections/pdfContext.ts) with smart pagination, orphan prevention, and color-coded card system
technicalStack.analysisEngine: src/lib/solarReturnAnalysis.ts — 1300+ lines computing all SR data points
technicalStack.renderEntry: src/components/SolarReturnPDFExport.tsx — orchestrates all sections in order

inputData.natalChart: Birth chart with planets (sign, degree, house), house cusps, birth date, birth location
inputData.solarReturnChart: SR chart with planets, house cusps, solar return year, SR location
inputData.birthdayMode: Toggle for gift presentation (zodiac cake images, gold borders, affirmation card)
inputData.personalMessage: Custom message for birthday gift mode

analysisDataPoints.yearlyTheme: SR Ascendant sign → ruler → ruler's SR position = year's overarching theme
analysisDataPoints.srAscRulerInNatal: J-B Morin / Lynn Bell technique: SR Asc ruler's NATAL house = where the year plays out

profectionYear.description: Hellenistic annual profection: age → house → traditional ruler = Time Lord

analysisDataPoints.lordOfTheYear: Natal chart ruler (Asc sign ruler) — fixed planet, separate from Time Lord
analysisDataPoints.sunHouse: SR Sun house placement + natal house overlay
analysisDataPoints.moonHouse: SR Moon house + natal house overlay
analysisDataPoints.moonPhase: Sun-Moon phase at moment of return (New, Full, Balsamic, etc.)
analysisDataPoints.moonVOC: Void of Course — unaspected SR Moon
analysisDataPoints.moonMetonicAges: Ages when SR Moon was in same sign (19-year cycle)
analysisDataPoints.srMoonAspects: Moon's aspects to other SR planets (frozen snapshot)
analysisDataPoints.houseOverlays: Each SR planet mapped to both SR house and natal house
analysisDataPoints.srToNatalAspects: Aspects between SR planets and natal planets with orbs
analysisDataPoints.srInternalAspects: Aspects within the SR chart itself
analysisDataPoints.stelliums: 3+ planets in same sign or house, with sign/house meanings and blend interpretations
analysisDataPoints.elementBalance: Fire/Earth/Air/Water count with dominant and missing elements
analysisDataPoints.angularPlanets: Planets conjunct angles (most powerful in SR)
analysisDataPoints.saturnFocus: Saturn's sign, house, retrograde status, and interpretation
analysisDataPoints.nodesFocus: North Node sign and house with growth direction
analysisDataPoints.vertex: Calculated fated encounters point with sign, house, and aspects
analysisDataPoints.natalDegreeConduits: SR planets within 2° of natal planet degrees (Lynn Bell)
analysisDataPoints.retrogrades: List of retrograde SR planets with interpretation

pdfSections.name: Cover Page
pdfSections.description: Title page with person's name, SR year, Sun/Moon/Rising signs, birth details, and SR location. Birthday mode adds zodiac cake image (200x170pt) and personal message.
features: Gold decorative borders in gift mode

pdfSections.name: Table of Contents
pdfSections.description: Single-page TOC with dot leaders and real-time page numbers. Two-pass system: first pass renders document and registers section pages, second pass retrofits clickable links.

pdfSections.name: How To Read This Report
pdfSections.description: Educational intro explaining what a Solar Return is and how to use the report.

pdfSections.name: Your Big Three (Sun, Moon, Rising)
pdfSections.description: Multi-page layout — one planet per page. Each planet gets: Natal Strength (green box), Natal Shadow (peach box), How This Year Activates You (gold box), Where It Plays Out (blue box).
features: Color-coded tinted boxes with 1.5pt left-accent bars
Interplay between natal signs and SR signs explained
pdfSections.importance: Identified as the most important section by the user. Designed for maximum readability and impact.

pdfSections.name: Year At A Glance
pdfSections.description: Overview snapshot of the year's key themes, profection, time lord, moon phase, and SR Ascendant.

pdfSections.name: Profection Wheel
pdfSections.description: Visual wheel mapping ages 0-99 to house themes with the active house highlighted. Shows current age and corresponding profection house.

pdfSections.name: Personal Profection Deep Dive
pdfSections.description: Detailed explanation of the current profection house, Time Lord planet, its SR house/sign position, dignity, and retrograde effects.

pdfSections.name: Key Dates
pdfSections.description: Calculates exact dates during the year when the Time Lord aspects natal planets. Categorized into 'Green Light Periods' and 'Pressure Points'.

pdfSections.name: Moon Sign Shift
pdfSections.description: Side-by-side comparison of Natal Moon sign vs SR Moon sign. If different, shows a detailed shift narrative with Body, Apply, and Daily Life subsections.

pdfSections.name: Solar Return vs Natal Table
pdfSections.description: Comparison table showing each planet's SR position, SR house, natal position, natal house, and sign shift. Gold header row, alternating row backgrounds.

pdfSections.name: Stelliums — Power Zones
pdfSections.description: Separated into Sign Stelliums and House Stelliums. Each card shows planets, personalized interpretation (sign+house+planets), felt-sense description, and planet role list.

interpretationData.personalizedText: getPersonalizedStelliumText() — combines sign, house, and planet names into narrative
interpretationData.blendMeanings: getStelliumBlendMeaning() — specific planet combination interpretations (Sun-Moon, Venus-Mars, etc.)

pdfSections.name: Element, Modality & Energy
pdfSections.description: Visual grid showing Fire/Earth/Air/Water counts and Cardinal/Fixed/Mutable counts. Dominant element/modality highlighted. Includes 2x2 hemispheric grid (Upper/Lower/East/West) with planet lists.
subSections: Modality Balance (3 boxes with initiating/sustaining/adapting labels)
Where Your Energy Lives (2x2 hemispheric grid with planet names)

pdfSections.name: Lord of the Year
pdfSections.description: The profection Time Lord (NOT the natal chart ruler). Shows the planet, its SR sign/house, dignity, and retrograde status. Explains WHY this planet rules the year via the profection house cusp ruler logic.
subCards: Why [Planet] Is Your Lord of the Year — profection logic explained
What This Means For Your Year — detailed planet-as-Time-Lord interpretation
What It Rules / How You Feel It — life domain + body sensation
Where the Lord sits in the SR — house interpretation
Dignity Warning/Advantage — if in Detriment/Fall or Domicile/Exaltation
Retrograde Effect — if Time Lord is Rx in SR

pdfSections.name: Saturn & North Node
pdfSections.description: Dedicated page explaining Saturn (where discipline is required) and North Node (where soul growth happens). Includes house meanings, sign behaviors, retrograde effects, and a Saturn-Node synthesis card.

pdfSections.name: Key Aspects
pdfSections.description: SR-to-Natal aspects (excluding Sun conjunct Sun). Up to 8 major aspects shown. Each card has colored accent (warm for hard aspects, gold for soft), orb, houses, and three subsections: How It Feels, What It Means, What To Do.

pdfSections.name: Your Moon This Year — Emotional Climate
pdfSections.description: SR Moon deep dive: VOC status, angularity, late degree, Metonic cycle echoes, and individual Moon-to-planet aspects. The Moon is treated as a STATIC SNAPSHOT, never as a monthly progression.
subSections: Moon Void of Course (Gift/Challenge when unaspected)
Individual Moon aspect cards with interpretations

pdfSections.name: Vertex — Fated Encounters
pdfSections.description: Calculated from MC and geographic latitude. Shows Vertex sign, degree, house, with fated theme and 'Who May Appear' interpretation.

pdfSections.name: Planet Spotlight
pdfSections.description: Individual planet-in-house cards for Mercury through Pluto. Each shows overview, 'What This Looks Like' (practical), and 'Watch For' (caution).
pdfSections.dataSource: src/lib/solarReturnPlanetInHouseDeep.ts — detailed interpretations for each planet in each of the 12 houses

pdfSections.name: Year-Ahead Reading (AI Narrative)
pdfSections.description: AI-generated narrative text rendered with markdown parsing (## headers, **bold**, body text). Only included if a narrative was generated.
pdfSections.aiModel: Generated via Lovable AI edge function

pdfSections.name: Best Months & Highlights + Month-by-Month Calendar
pdfSections.description: Two-part section: (1) Up to 4 personalized highlight cards with icon badges (KEY, FEEL, POWER, SHIFT, STAR, WORK) covering year's focus, emotional climate, power zones, year-defining aspect, chart ruler, and discipline areas. (2) 12-month calendar grid (3 columns × 4 rows, all on one page) starting from birth month with personalized monthly forecasts.
highlightCards: This Year's Focus — profection house theme
Emotional Climate — Moon sign + house + angularity/VOC/late degree
Power Zone — first stellium location + blend meaning
Year-Defining Aspect — strongest SR-to-natal aspect (major planets only)
Your Chart Ruler — natal Asc ruler in SR vs natal positions
Where Discipline Is Required — Saturn focus

monthlyLogic.startMonth: Calculated from actual birth date, NOT sign approximation
monthlyLogic.yearCalculation: Months before birthday month get next year
monthlyLogic.themeRotation: Houses rotate from profection house: month 1 = profection house, month 2 = next house, etc.
monthlyLogic.headlines: Theme-based friendly labels (e.g., 'Follow the Fun', 'Career in Focus')
monthlyLogic.bodyContent: Personalized per month index: month 0 = opener with ASC ruler, month 11 = integration, months 1-2 = stellium, months 3-5 = Sun house + retrogrades, months 6-8 = Moon sign + Saturn, months 9-10 = nodes + repeated themes

pdfSections.name: Birthday Affirmation Card
pdfSections.description: Birthday-mode only. A warm, personality-driven 'birthday letter' that synthesizes natal Sun gift, Moon need, and Rising impression into an inspiring closing. Year-ahead inspiration based on profection house theme (e.g., 'follow the joy' for 5th house year).
pdfSections.tone: Warm, personal, non-technical. No anxiety-inducing tasks. Feels like a letter from a wise friend.

birthdayGiftMode.description: Toggle that adds zodiac cake images, gold borders with diamond ornaments, suppresses page numbers, and adds the affirmation card.
birthdayGiftMode.signColorThemes: Each zodiac sign has a unique color palette applied to the entire PDF (gold, softGold, deepBrown, warmBorder, creamBg, accentGreen, accentRust, softBlue)

globalFeatures.goldBorders: Optional decorative double gold border on every page with corner circles and midpoint diamond ornaments
globalFeatures.clickableTOC: Table of Contents entries are clickable PDF links that jump to the correct page
globalFeatures.pageNumbers: Added to all pages except cover (suppressed entirely in birthday mode)
globalFeatures.smartPagination: PDFContext prevents orphaned lines (<4 lines on either side of a break), keeps bold headers with their content, and uses dynamic top spacing

interpretationDataFiles.solarReturnInterpretations: src/lib/solarReturnInterpretations.ts — SR Sun/Moon in house, overlays, ruler conditions
interpretationDataFiles.solarReturnAspectInterp: src/lib/solarReturnAspectInterp.ts — SR-to-natal aspect interpretations with How It Feels / What It Means / What To Do
interpretationDataFiles.solarReturnMoonData: src/lib/solarReturnMoonData.ts — Moon in house deep, Moon phase, angularity, aspects
interpretationDataFiles.solarReturnPlanetInHouseDeep: src/lib/solarReturnPlanetInHouseDeep.ts — Mercury through Pluto in all 12 houses
interpretationDataFiles.moonSignShiftData: src/lib/moonSignShiftData.ts — Detailed Moon sign descriptions and sign-to-sign shift narratives

colors.gold: [162, 128, 72] — Primary accent, section titles, card headers

colorCodedBoxes.green: Natal Strength, gifts, 'What This Looks Like'
colorCodedBoxes.gold: Year-ahead activation, How This Year Changes Things
colorCodedBoxes.blue: Where It Plays Out, SR Moon context

cardSystem.breathingRoom: 4pt gap between header and body text

knownIssues: Unicode astrological symbols (☉, ☽, etc.) replaced with text labels for cross-platform stability
stelliumSignMeaning and stelliumHouseMeaning are duplicated between SolarReturnPDFExport.tsx and solarReturnAnalysis.ts

Moon Sign Shift, SR vs Natal Table, Stelliums, Element/Modality, Lord of Year, Saturn/Node, Key Aspects, Moon Climate, Vertex, and Planet Spotlight are all rendered inline in SolarReturnPDFExport.tsx rather than extracted to separate pdfSections files
Monthly forecast body text may clip in 3×4 grid cells for longer interpretations
timeLordDetailedMeaning only covers Sun through Saturn (missing Uranus, Neptune, Pluto as Time Lords)
possibleImprovements: Extract inline sections from SolarReturnPDFExport.tsx into modular pdfSections files for maintainability
Add Uranus/Neptune/Pluto to timeLordDetailedMeaning for modern profection rulers
Add SR-internal aspect section to PDF (currently only SR-to-natal aspects are rendered)
Add natal degree conduit section to PDF (data is calculated but not rendered)
Add repeated themes consolidation card to PDF
Consider adding a 'What To Watch For Each Quarter' summary section
Add eclipse awareness if SR Moon or Sun is near eclipse degrees
Improve monthly forecast personalization — currently uses generic house themes rotated from profection
